title: Cristalinas Pet Odour Eliminating, Reed Diffuser Fresh Air Scent - 30ml Air Freshener for Home - Lasts upto 4 weeks - Reed Diffuser for Home, Blue
features: [Fresh Air Scent for a Revitalising Ambience] - Refresh your surroundings with our invigorating Fresh Air reed diffuser. Indulge in the crisp and revitalising fragrance, bringing a breath of fresh air into your home.

[Pet-Friendly Odour Eliminating Room Diffusers] - Our odour neutralising ScentSilent technology targets lingering pet odours, cooking and household smells. Keep your home pet-friendly with our room scent diffusers.

[Long-Lasting Fragrance] - Using a delicate blend of natural essential oils and 0% alcohol our stick diffuser will continuously fragrance your room for up to 4 weeks. Banish lingering pet smells and fill your home with a delightful fragrance.

[Stylish, Sturdy Design] - the sturdy, natural wooden cube reed diffuser helps keep it safe from wagging tails. The coloured fragrance oil and matching coloured diffuser sticks also add a decorative touch to your room.
[Perfect Gift for a Pet-Lover] - Treat yourself or surprise another pet owner with a reed diffuser gift. Banish pet odours and infuse your space with captivating fragrances.
description: Product Description Transform your home into a pet-friendly oasis with our odour eliminating scent diffusers featuring innovative ScentSilentTM technology. Our pet diffusers are meticulously formulated using specific pet-friendly, natural essential oils and no alcohol to create a high-quality reed diffuser oil. Banish lingering pet smells and experience captivating scents and long-lasting fragrances with our home fragrance reed diffuser. Eliminate household odours and let our carefully curated home scents transform your living spaces. Embrace the convenience of our value for money reed diffuser multipack, providing you with an extended supply of your favourite home scents. Our range of scented sticks reed diffusers for pets have coloured fragrance oil with matching coloured rattan reeds. Elevate your home fragrance experience and indulge in soothing and inviting aromas that transform your space and create a welcoming home ambience. Treat yourself or surprise another pet owner with a reed diffuser gift. Ingredients Fragrance oil, fragrance bottle, rattan reeds, wooden bottle holder Manufacturer Contact Information Hugworld Cristalinas UK Limited, Hyde Park House, Cartwright Street, Hyde, Cheshire, SK14 4EH. See more
